name: janus_revoke_batch
description: Batch revoke all dangerous token approvals in one call. Your agent sends a wallet address, Janus scans all approvals, identifies every risky one, and returns pre-built revoke calldata for ALL of them. One request, all threats neutralized. Returns structured JSON with an array of transactions ready to execute on Base.

requirement.wallet: Wallet address to batch-revoke approvals for (0x...)
